d: Faramor consumes [[250]] Energy to summon a [[1]]-tile magic circle, centered on his current target, dealing [[210%]]<ATK> true damage to enemies caught inside. While the circle is active, he consumes [[120]] Energy per second to maintain it. Enemies within the circle cannot heal; every [[0.5]]s, they take [[35%]]<ATK> true damage, plus extra true damage equal to [[20%]] of their lost HP. The extra true damage cannot exceed [[240%]] of Faramor's ATK. If no enemies remain in the circle for [[1]]s, the skill ends immediately.
Increases the damage dealt when summoning the magic circle to [[220%]]<ATK> and the subsequent damage to [[40%]]<ATK> per hit.
Increases the damage dealt when summoning the magic circle to [[230%]]<ATK> and the subsequent damage to [[45%]]<ATK> per hit.
Increases the damage dealt when summoning the magic circle to [[240%]]<ATK> and the subsequent damage to [[50%]]<ATK> per hit.
Increases the damage dealt when summoning the magic circle to [[250%]]<ATK> and the subsequent damage to [[55%]]<ATK> per hit.

Faramor prays to imbue his weapon with sacred power, gaining a shield that can absorb [[200%]]<ATK> damage while dealing [[250%]]<ATK> damage to his current target. The shield lasts for [[6]]s. If Faramor has an active non-permanent stat boost from his allies when using this skill, it instead deals true damage.
Increases the damage dealt to the target to [[260%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to the target to [[270%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to the target to [[280%]]<ATK>.

Passive. During battle preparation, Faramor can bless an adjacent allied hero, prioritizing those placed behind him.
Active. Faramor increases ATK by [[12%]] for [[10]]s for both himself and the hero he blesses, automatically reapplying the buff when it expires. Every [[3]]s while the buff is active, Faramor also deals [[100%]]<ATK> damage to enemies within [[1]] tile of both himself and the blessed hero, stunning the affected enemies for [[0.5]]s.
Faramor increases the ATK of himself and the blessed allied hero by [[13%]].
Faramor increases the ATK of himself and the blessed allied hero by [[14%]].
Faramor increases the ATK of himself and the blessed allied hero by [[15%]].
Increases Haste by [[12]] during battle.
Increases Haste by [[16]] during battle.
Increases Haste by [[20]] during battle.

Faramor replaces his normal attacks with Glory's Embrace while his magic circle is active, but the shield value he gains from Glory's Embrace is capped at [[600%]]<ATK>. The magic circle also weakens the enemies within it, allowing allies to deal extra true damage equal to [[75%]] of their ATK. Each ally can only trigger the extra damage once every [[1]]s.
Increases the extra true damage dealt by allies to [[80%]] of their ATK.
When an enemy is defeated within the magic circle, grants Faramor [[10%]] ATK and expands the circle's radius to [[2]] tiles. This effect can only trigger once per battle.
Increases the extra true damage dealt by allies to [[85%]] of their ATK.
If an enemy revives within Faramor's magic circle after their HP drops to 0, Faramor will reduce their Vitality by [[50]].
